title: Lapis Advancements
description: This datapack adds 40+ new advancements for you to collect!
body:
# Lapis Advancements

Lapis Advancements is a datapack aimed at expanding the vanilla advancements while staying true to the vanilla way.

**Examples of new Advancements are featured in the first release are:**
- Pirate License (Find all 9 Ocean Biomes)
- Flower Power (Collect all Flowers)
- God of the Rainbow (Collect all Coloured Items and Blocks)
- The Start of a Collection (Obtain any music disc)

For the advancements in the pack to make sense, some vanilla advancements have been shuffled around to create space for new ones, or for the order you get them to make sense, such as "Sound of Music" being parented by "The Start of a Collection".
Similarly, the visuals of a very select few vanilla advancements have been changed, such as **A Seedy Place** now using seeds as its icon, or **Very Very Frightening** and **Arbalistic** getting an enchantment glint on their icon since an enchantment is required to obtain them.

**Plans for the Future**:
- Add Translations for German, French and Russian and more later on
- Add at least 50 more advancements
